title: Qualatex 57319 Round Birthday Magical Unicorn Latex Balloon, 18-Inch
features: Available in many colours and sizes
Balloon Entertainers worldwide choose Qualatex balloons
Can be inflated with air or helium
description: Product Description Genuine Qualatex balloons - the choice of professionals. Balloon entertainers worldwide choose Qualatex balloons. Available in many colours and sizes. These 18" balloons are recognised as the very best Qualatex latex balloons, made in USA from 100% natural, biodegradable latex. Safety Warning WARNING! Children under eight years can choke or suffocate on uninflated or broken balloons. Adult supervision required. Keep uninflated balloons from children. Discard broken balloons at once. Made of natural rubber latex, which may cause allergies. Use a pump to blow up the balloon! Please retain this information for future reference. WARNING! Not suitable for children under 36 months due to potential small parts which may pose a choking hazard. Adult supervision required. You are advised to keep this for future reference. Do not inhale helium or balloon gas as this may result in unconsciousness and can cause death due to lack of oxygen. Box Contains 1x Balloon See more
